channel.title: Posts on Hollis Akins
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Hollis Akins

item.title: The Effects of Nativism on Americans' Tolerance of Diversity
item.description: The 2016 presidential election brought discussions of immigration policy and American identity to the national spotlight. Minutes into the announcement of his presidential campaign, Donald Trump launched into an attack of Mexican immigrants, referring to them as “rapists and criminals” and vowing to restrict immigration through the construction of a border wall. His first campaign ad directly targeted Muslim immigrants, tying them to “radical Islamic terrorism” and vowing to ban their entering the country.
